examples: The curtain ripped from top to bottom
pull the cooked chicken into strips
The tornado ripped along the coast

meanings.definition: criticize or abuse strongly and violently
examples: The candidate ripped into his opponent mercilessly

meanings.definition: resembling a sound of violent tearing as of something ripped apart or lightning splitting a tree
examples: the tree split with a great ripping sound
heard a rending roar as the crowd surged forward
